validation_results.name: Lint
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/domain lint && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators lint && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/application lint && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api lint

validation_results.name: Build
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/domain build && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators build && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/application build && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/adapters build

kpi_results.actual: Parallel UNION + composite indexes targeting <250ms; 7-table Promise.all merge sort
tRPC WS subscriptions (IFC-016) invalidate feed cache on lead/task/system events; 60s fallback poll
Repository passes tenantId to all 7 Prisma queries; router extracts from ctx.user.tenantId; 93 tests verify isolation

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Domain constants and types for activity feed defined
definition_of_done_items.evidence: ActivityFeedConstants.ts (7 sources, 17 types, 5 entity types) + ActivityFeedTypes.ts (6 interfaces)

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Zod validators derived from domain constants
definition_of_done_items.evidence: packages/validators/src/activity-feed.ts with 8 schemas derived from domain constants

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Application service with cursor pagination and caching
definition_of_done_items.evidence: ActivityFeedService.ts with cursor-based pagination, 30s cache TTL, dedup by ID
PrismaActivityFeedRepository.ts with 7 query methods, type maps, merge sort

definition_of_done_items.criterion: tRPC router with getUnifiedFeed and getEntityFeed

definition_of_done_items.evidence: useActivityFeed.ts with useInfiniteQuery + tRPC WS subscriptions for real-time invalidation
PrismaActivityFeedRepository in container.ts L103; ActivityFeedService in container.ts L227-230; Router in router.ts L152

invariants_acknowledged: Hexagonal architecture: domain -> validators -> application -> adapters -> API -> UI
DRY enum pattern: domain const arrays as single source of truth
Multi-tenancy: all queries must be scoped to tenantId
Cursor pagination: base64-encoded timestamp|id for deterministic ordering

notes: IFC-069 FLOW-020: Unified Activity Feed Service — Full hexagonal implementation across 6 layers. Domain (7 sources, 17 types, 5 entity types), validators (8 Zod schemas), application service (cursor pagination, 30s cache, dedup), Prisma adapter (7-table UNION via Promise.all with merge sort), tRPC router (getUnifiedFeed + getEntityFeed), React component (virtual scrolling via @tanstack/react-virtual). 93 tests across 4 layers (14 domain + 40 validators + 22 application + 17 router). DI wiring verified in container.ts and router.ts. Real-time updates via tRPC WebSocket subscriptions (IFC-016): lead scored, task assigned, system events invalidate feed cache; 60s fallback poll as safety net.
